name: Interrupts
perPoint: A backup kick the party throws at dangerous casts — better than nothing, but a real interrupter spec lands it far more reliably.
starved: Dangerous casts go off unchecked and stack the party into a wipe.

name: Positioning
perPoint: Sidestep more of every avoidable mechanic: it lands for 42% of its damage at 1 point, 24% at 2, just 6% at 3 (−18% per point).
starved: Avoidable mechanics land in full — the floor does the killing.

name: Cooldowns
perPoint: During boss burn windows, each point adds +4% party damage and shaves −10% off incoming spike damage.
starved: Cooldowns fire in the wrong phase and burn for nothing.

name: Kill Order
perPoint: Each point sharpens target priority on trash — +6% effective party DPS as they focus the right enemy first.
starved: Adds linger too long; the healer runs dry holding it together.
